message:
fix: resolve prop_assert format string errors in proptest files

The `prop_assert!(matches!(x, Foo { .. }))` pattern confuses the macro's
format string parser — `{ .. }` is interpreted as a format placeholder.
Fix by extracting to a local bool first.

Fixed in proptest_capacity_governor, proptest_events, proptest_wire_protocol.

cargo check -p frankenterm-core --tests now passes with 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
